title: Geyser Mod
body:
![Overworld and nether geyser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zjYYSiHT/images/c34afd59cf87a324ecbc066dd86ac312391ad43d.png)
Geyser mod adds naturally generated geysers in the mountains and nether. Both can be mined using silk touch and be made into redstone-activated variations.
